---
title: "Materiali"
listing:
  type: table
  contents:
    - materiali/01-crisi-replicabilita-slides.qmd
    - materiali/02-systematic-review-intro.qmd
    - materiali/03-rstudio-basics.qmd
    - materiali/05-datasets.qmd
    - materiali/06-effect-sizes-slides.qmd
    - materiali/07-meta-analisi-teoria-slides.qmd
    - materiali/08-esercizi-meta-analisi.qmd
    - materiali/09-meta-analisi-bayes-slides.qmd
    - materiali/091-supplementary-materials.qmd
    - materiali/esercizi-rstudio.qmd
  sort: "title asc"
  fields: [title, author, date]
---

<br>
